prose.en: Internal and external stakeholders are understood, and their needs and expectations regarding cybersecurity risk management are understood and considered
Identify relevant internal stakeholders and their cybersecurity-related expectations (e.g., performance and risk expectations of officers, directors, and advisors; cultural expectations of employees)

Identify relevant external stakeholders and their cybersecurity-related expectations (e.g., privacy expectations of customers, business expectations of partnerships, compliance expectations of regulators, ethics expectations of society)

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.GV-02
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.GV-02
nist-withdrawal.prose: Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities are coordinated and aligned with internal roles and external partners

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.SC-02
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.SC-02
nist-withdrawal.prose: Suppliers and third party partners of information systems, components, and services are identified, prioritized, and assessed using a cyber supply chain risk assessment process
